title: palicourea guianensis subsp. barbinervia
intro: Palicourea guianensis subsp. barbinervia is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Guianan palicourea. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Palicourea guianensis subsp. barbinervia include the potential treatment of conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a paste or poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
